task_completion.description: The security-crypto dependency is added to the app-level build.gradle.kts file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the app-level build.gradle.kts file open in the editor with a line similar to `implementation("androidx.security:security-crypto:1.0.0")` (or a higher version) in the dependencies block.

task_completion.description: A MasterKey is initialized in TokenManager.kt using MasterKey.Builder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for TokenManager.kt open in the editor showing code that instantiates a MasterKey using `MasterKey.Builder(context)`.

task_completion.description: EncryptedSharedPreferences is created with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for `EncryptedSharedPreferences.create(...)` in TokenManager.kt. The first parameter (or the fileName parameter) must be the string `"secure_app_prefs"`.

task_completion.description: The correct AES encryption schemes are specified for keys and values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for `EncryptedSharedPreferences.PrefKeyEncryptionScheme.AES256_SIV` and `EncryptedSharedPreferences.PrefValueEncryptionScheme.AES256_GCM` passed as arguments to the `EncryptedSharedPreferences.create` method in TokenManager.kt.

task_completion.description: The TokenManagerTest unit tests are executed and pass successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Android Studio Run/Test tool window or a terminal showing the execution of `TokenManagerTest` (or `./gradlew test`) with green checkmarks, 'BUILD SUCCESSFUL', or a message indicating all tests passed.

integrity.description: The agent used an IDE or proper text editor to modify the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for Android Studio, IntelliJ, or another code editor interface being used to edit build.gradle.kts and TokenManager.kt, rather than just using terminal commands like `echo` or `sed` to blindly insert code.

integrity.description: The test results come from a genuine test execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Gradle test output in the terminal or the official Android Studio test runner UI. It should not be a simple text file or manually typed output mimicking a test pass.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the test file to trivially pass.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there is no evidence of the agent opening and deleting/commenting out the assertions in `TokenManagerTest.kt` just to make the test suite pass.
